title: Fixed Bottle o' Enchanting Amount
description: A simple mod that adds a gamerule that allows you to change the amount of XP a Bottle o' Enchanting gives
body:
## Fixed Experience Bottles
This is a simple mod that adds a gamerule (fixedBottleXp) that allows you to change the amount of XP a Bottle o' Enchanting gives the player.

The acceptable values are in between **-2,147,483,648** and **2,147,483,647.** (where anything less than 0 results in using the vanilla code, ie. random between 3-11)
